# RC-06: CAB Approval

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Formal change approval from the appropriate authority based on risk classification: high-risk changes require Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval; medium-risk requires line management; low-risk may use a pre-approved standard change procedure. This control cannot be delegated to an agent under any circumstances.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 5 | Deployment & Release | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Human required |
| **Agent does** | Prepare change approval request with full evidence package; schedule CAB slot if required. |
| **Human does** | Make the formal approval decision. This control cannot be delegated to an agent under any circumstances. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Release readiness checklist | QC-09 | Completed checklist confirming all controls passed; forms the basis of the CAB submission. |
| Risk classification | RC-01 | Determines required approval authority (CAB vs. line management vs. pre-approved). |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Change approval record | decision | Formal approval decision with approver identity, role, timestamp, and any conditions. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Change Advisory Board |

Rejected changes cannot proceed to deployment. Work may return to any required stage.

## Dependencies

- `QC-09`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(1) | Governance and control of ICT changes requires formal approval at appropriate authority level |
| DORA | Art. 5 | Management body accountability for ICT risk framework and change approvals |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management / Release Management · **Owner role:** Change Advisory Board
